descriptions: Fuerzas Especiales Chukys is the elite operational group of the Cártel del Noreste.
edges.evidence_quote: Lo que se llama las Fuerzas Especiales Chukys o (Los Chukys) es el grupo operativo del Cartel del Noreste (CDN) especializado en acciones de alto impacto.

descriptions: Portuguese Mafia is a junior faction spawned from Doddington.
edges.evidence_quote: Doddington gave rise to the ... Portuguese Mafia

descriptions: Infoboox lists Portuguese Mafia as rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Portuguese Mafia

descriptions: Sasaki-gumi is a sub-organization of Hirota-gumi.

Clan Fabbrocino.description: The Fabbrocino clan is a Camorra mafia-type criminal organization originating from the area between Ottaviano, San Gennaro Vesuviano, and San Giuseppe Vesuviano in Italy. It was founded by Mario Fabbrocino after breaking away from Michele Zaza's group. The clan controls a vast territory in the Vesuvian area and is involved in diverse criminal activities including extortion, vote-buying, and money laundering through legitimate businesses. Mario Fabbrocino was sentenced to life imprisonment for the murder of Roberto Cutolo.

descriptions: Clan Fabbrocino is a Camorra clan involved in waste trafficking with Chinese gangs.
edges.evidence_quote: Tra i clan coinvolti in questa alleanza c'erano il clan dei Casalesi, il clan Fabbrocino e il clan Ascione.

descriptions: The two clans jointly carried out a revenge killing.
edges.evidence_quote: Per vendicarsi i Fabbrocino e gli Ascione avrebbero ucciso Salvatore Batti

descriptions: Clan Cava has alliances with Clan Fabbrocino and Clan Russo.
edges.evidence_quote: Ancora oggi, quello schieramento di parte si rispecchia nelle alleanze che i Cava hanno con altri gruppi criminali dell' agro nolano come i clan Russo di Nola e Fabbrocino

descriptions: Fabbrocino killed Roberto Cutolo with support from the 'Ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: eliminando, a Tradate , con il supporto della 'ndrangheta calabrese ... Roberto Cutolo

descriptions: Fabbrocino expanded into territories of the weakened Anastasio and D'Avino clans.
edges.evidence_quote: Alcuni collaboratori di giustizia , che in passato hanno militato nei clan Anastasio di Sant'Anastasia e D'Avino di Somma Vesuviana , hanno dichiarato ai giudici che, a seguito del grosso ridimensionamento che ha interessato i due predetti clan, i Fabbrocino avrebbero allargato le loro vedute

descriptions: The Fabbrocino clan is a part of the Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: Mario Fabbrocino was a powerful Italian crime boss of the Camorra – the Neapolitan mafia.

descriptions: The Batti clan is considered the longa manus (extended arm) of the Fabbrocino clan, acting on their behalf.
edges.evidence_quote: La famiglia Batti di San Giuseppe Vesuviano è considerata dagli inquirenti la "longa manus" del clan Fabbrocino.

descriptions: The Bifulco clan is described as a branch (filiale) of the Fabbrocino clan, supporting them.
edges.evidence_quote: i Fabbrocino, supportati dal clan Bifulco, una 'filiale' dei primi

descriptions: Fabbrocino was historically strongly linked to the Cava and Russo clans.
edges.evidence_quote: un tempo fortemente legata ai clan Cava e Russo

descriptions: The Antonio Giugliano clan is linked to the Fabbrocino clan, as its leader was a former lieutenant of Mario Fabbrocino.
edges.evidence_quote: una delle quali - guidata da Antonio Giugliano, inteso 'o savariello, ex luogotenente di Mario Fabbrocino, e il figlio di questi, Giuseppe Giuliano Giugliano - legata al clan dei Fabbrocino.

descriptions: Fabbrocino made a pact with the Mazzarella clan to enter into large contracts.
edges.evidence_quote: i Fabbrocino, previo l'aver stipulato un patto con i Mazzarella di San Giovanni a Teduccio , volevano entrare nei maxi- appalti del Centro direzionale di Napoli

descriptions: Fabbrocino was historically strongly linked to the Cava and Russo clans.
edges.evidence_quote: un tempo fortemente legata ai clan Cava e Russo

descriptions: Fabbrocino planned to expand into the eastern zone of Naples taking advantage of the Sarno clan's decline.
edges.evidence_quote: i Fabbrocino avevano anche in progetto di estendere i propri tentacoli sino alla Zona orientale di Napoli , approfittando della debacle del clan Sarno di Ponticelli

descriptions: The Fabbrocino clan and the Nuova Camorra Organizzata were in a violent feud, with murders on both sides.
edges.evidence_quote: The feud with Cutolo intensified when Cutolo ordered the killing of Fabbrocino's brother Francesco. Fabbrocino later avenged his brother's death by ordering the murder of Cutolo's only son, Roberto, on 19 December 1990.

descriptions: Fabbrocino and Alfieri both lost brothers to the Nuova Camorra Organizzata under Cutolo's orders.
edges.evidence_quote: Sia Alfieri che Fabbrocino, per mano della Nuova Camorra Organizzata e per volere di Cutolo, subirono la perdita di un fratello

descriptions: The Fabbrocino clan, through its leader, was a leading member of the Nuova Famiglia coalition.
edges.evidence_quote: He was one of the leaders of the Nuova Famiglia, created in the 1980s to face the rising power of Raffaele Cutolo's Nuova Camorra Organizzata.

descriptions: Mario Fabbrocino contributed to the founding of the Onorata fratellanza.
edges.evidence_quote: Si presume che l'8 dicembre del 1978 Mario Fabbrocino , detto ' o gravunaro , abbia contribuito alla nascita della cosiddetta Onorata fratellanza

descriptions: Mario Fabbrocino was one of the promoters of the Nuova Famiglia.
edges.evidence_quote: Mario Fabbrocino ... fu uno dei promotori dell'organizzazione " Nuova Famiglia " , la quale fronteggiava la Nuova Camorra Organizzata

descriptions: Both were members of the Nuova Famiglia federation.
edges.evidence_quote: the Nuova Famiglia (NF) was formed. The NF was a federation of Camorra clans which apart from the Nuovoletta clan, consisted of ... the Fabbrocino clan

descriptions: Clan Russo planned to expand into territory once controlled by Clan Fabbrocino.
edges.evidence_quote: la nuova generazione dei Russo, che avrebbe cominciato a seguire un piano per allargarsi fino a San Giuseppe Vesuviano , una volta territorio del clan Fabbrocino.

edges.evidence_quote: Cutolo's son, Roberto Cutolo who was shot dead by members of the Fabbrocino clan

edges.evidence_quote: insidia la camorra vesuviana di Fabbrocino e Orefice

descriptions: Fabbrocino clan was part of the anti-Cutolo alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: Altre famiglie coinvolte nell'ampia alleanza anticutoliana furono ... i Fabbrocino di San Giuseppe Vesuviano

East Harlem Purple Gang.description: The East Harlem Purple Gang was an Italian-American organized crime group based in New York City, active from the early 1970s to the 1980s. It consisted of hit-men and heroin dealers who were semi-independent from the Italian-American Mafia but allied with several crime families, particularly the Genovese family. The gang dominated heroin distribution in East Harlem, Italian Harlem, and the Bronx. At its peak, it had about 30 members and 80 associates, and was considered an unofficial sixth family.

descriptions: The East Harlem Purple Gang is listed as an ally of the 116th Street Crew.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Bonanno , Colombo , Gambino , Lucchese , Purple Gang

descriptions: The 116th Street Crew absorbed former members of the East Harlem Purple Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: By the late 1970s and early 1980s, the 116th Street Crew had absorbed and initiated many former members of the vicious East Harlem Purple Gang

descriptions: The American Mafia is allied with the Purple Gang.

Aryan Brotherhood.description: The Aryan Brotherhood is a white supremacist prison gang and organized crime syndicate in the United States, founded in 1964 at San Quentin State Prison. With an estimated 20,000 members inside and outside prison, it is responsible for up to 25% of murders in the federal prison system despite comprising less than 3% of the inmate population. The gang engages in drug trafficking, extortion, inmate prostitution, and contract killings, and is known for its hierarchical leadership structure and distinctive tattoos.

descriptions: Black P. Stones is a rival gang of Aryan Brotherhood.
edges.evidence_quote: Other rival gangs include the Black P. Stones, Bloods, Crips, D.C. Blacks, and Nuestra Familia.

descriptions: Aryan Brotherhood considers Black P. Stones a rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Otras bandas rivales incluyen los Black P. Stones

descriptions: Aryan Brotherhood formed a business partnership with the American Mafia, providing protection to John Gotti in prison and expanding criminal operations.
edges.evidence_quote: En 1992, la pandilla estableció lazos con el crimen de la Mafia estadounidense, a través del jefe John Gotti, quien fue sentenciado a prisión y contactó a la Hermandad Aria para protección mientras estaba en prisión. Gotti también organizó una sociedad comercial que operaba en el exterior entre su grupo y la Hermandad

descriptions: Aryan Brotherhood surpassed American Mafia in power and influence in prisons.
edges.evidence_quote: Asumieron el poder del crimen organizado dentro de gran parte del sistema penitenciario de los Estados Unidos, donde eventualmente acumularon mayor poder e influencia que Mafia estadounidense.

descriptions: Aryan Brotherhood considers Aryan Brotherhood of Texas an enemy.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: Hermandad Aria de Texas

edges.evidence_quote: Aryan League, which was formed by an alliance between the Aryan Brotherhood and Public Enemy No. 1

edges.evidence_quote: The Aryan Brotherhood grew quickly in the California prison system and eventually engaged in a race war in 1975 with the other prison gangs such as La Nuestra Familia, and Black Guerilla Family.

descriptions: Gambino crime family boss John Gotti allegedly asked Aryan Brotherhood to murder his attacker, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: This situation was personified when, after being assaulted by an African-American inmate while incarcerated in Marion Federal Penitentiary in 1996, Gambino crime family boss John Gotti allegedly asked the Aryan Brotherhood to murder his attacker.

descriptions: Aryan Brotherhood established ties with Gambino crime family via John Gotti, including a business partnership.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1992, the gang established ties with American Mafia crime, via boss John Gotti, who was sentenced to prison and contacted the Aryan Brotherhood for protection while he was in prison. Gotti also organized a business partnership which operated on the outside between his group and the Brotherhood and as a result of this business partnership, the group's power greatly expanded on the streets.

descriptions: Aryan Brotherhood and Hells Angels were involved in a power struggle resulting in a killing.
edges.evidence_quote: The Brotherhood has associated in criminal ventures with the Hells Angels. The gangs were also involved in a power struggle in the East Bay, which led to the killing of Hells Angels vice-president Michael O'Farrell on June 6, 1989.

descriptions: Aryan Brotherhood had a brief connection with Manson Family, attempted to join forces, but ended due to offense over Tate murder.
edges.evidence_quote: In the early 1970s, the Aryan Brotherhood had a connection with Charles Manson and the Manson Family. Several members of the Manson Family were in prison at the time, and they attempted to join forces. However, the relationship did not last long as the Aryan Brotherhood took offense at the murder of pregnant actress Sharon Tate.

These include the Hard Livings , 28s street gang, Junky Funky Kids, Ghetto Kids, Nice Time Kids, The Terrible West Siders, The Fancy Boys, 6bop gang, Mongrels, Young Gifteds and Terrible Josters.

descriptions: GajesGang is a main group within AFCA.

descriptions: The Trovato formed an alliance with Pepè Flachi's group, creating the Flachi-Trovato-Schettini triumvirate.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel 1987 a Caponago venne battezzata un'alleanza col gruppo di Pepè Flachi boss della comasina .

edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Vanella Grassi (girati)

descriptions: Mai-Mai Gedeon is loosely tied to Mai-Mai Kata Katanga.

descriptions: Lone Legion is a member of the A-Team alliance with Southern Vikings MC.
edges.evidence_quote: According to media and Police the club is a member of the "A-Team", an alliance between several NZ biker groups including the Outcasts MC, the Epitaph Riders MC, the Forty-Fives MC, the Southern Vikings MC, Satan's Slaves MC, Sinn Fein MC and the Lost Breed MC .

descriptions: White family succeeded Sabinis after WWII, taking over their criminal empire.
edges.evidence_quote: his empire was taken over by the White family led by Alf White

descriptions: Black P. Stones has a loose alliance with Playboy Gangster Crips.

descriptions: Venice 13 lists PlayBoys Gangster Crips as an ally in infobox.

descriptions: The PKK cooperated with TKEP/L as part of the Peoples' United Revolutionary Movement.
edges.evidence_quote: In March 2016, the PKK helped to launch the Peoples' United Revolutionary Movement with nine other Kurdish and Turkish revolutionary leftist, socialist and communist groups (including the TKP/ML , THKP-C/MLSPB , MKP , TKEP/L , TİKB , DKP , DK and MLKP ) with the aim of overthrowing the Turkish government of Recep Tayyip Erdoğan.

descriptions: Surviving Bottoms Gang members joined the Chouteau Avenue Gang after the Bottoms Gang dissolved.
edges.evidence_quote: A handful of the surviving members had relocated to the Soulard district where they fell in with a local mob known as the Chouteau Avenue Gang.

descriptions: The Chouteau Avenue Gang eventually evolved into the Cuckoo Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Over the fullness of time, this crew would evolve into the Cuckoo Gang.

descriptions: Antonio Vadalà was intercepted with capo Francesco Zindato of the Libri - Zindato 'ndrina in 2001.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel 2001 Antonio Vadalà viene intercettato con il capo-'ndrina Francesco Zindato dei Libri - Zindato

descriptions: The Rocks Push fought with the Gibb Street Mob.
edges.evidence_quote: The gang was engaged in running warfare with other larrikin gangs of the time such as the Miller's Point Push, Straw Hat Push, the Glebe Push, the Argyle Cut Push, the Forty Thieves from Surry Hills, and the Gibb Street Mob.

descriptions: ACMM merged to form AUC.
edges.evidence_quote: Al conformarse las AUC el 18 de abril de 1997, las Autodefensas Campesinas de Córdoba y Urabá, las del Magdalena Medio y las de los Llanos Orientales se unieron creando las Autodefensas Unidas de Colombia (AUC)

descriptions: Los Lobos and R7 are rival gangs involved in prison riots.
edges.evidence_quote: Alexander Quesada, the leader of Los Lobos, and Marcelo Anchundia, the leader of rival gang R7, were reportedly behind the riot

descriptions: Los Lobos and R7 fought in a prison riot.
edges.evidence_quote: The riot was fought between members of Los Lobos and R7 in an attempt to kill Anchundia

descriptions: Los Lobos and R7 were involved in a prison riot together, but R7 is described as a rival gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Se informó que Alexander Quesada, el cabecilla de Los Lobos, y Marcelo Anchundia, el líder de la pandilla rival R7, estuvieron detrás del motín.

descriptions: Los Lobos and R7 were involved in a prison riot in 2022, with R7 described as a rival gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Em 4 de abril de 2022, eclodiram distúrbios na prisão de Turi, Cuenca, que mataram pelo menos 20 presidiários. Alexander Quesada, o líder de Los Lobos, e Marcelo Anchundia, o líder da gangue rival R7, estariam supostamente por trás do motim.

descriptions: Los Lobos and R7 fought in a prison riot in 2022.
edges.evidence_quote: Em 9 de maio de 2022, pelo menos 44 reclusos foram mortos e mais de 100 conseguiram escapar após um motim na prisão de Bellavista, Santo Domingo. O motim foi travado entre membros de Los Lobos e R7 na tentativa de matar Anchundia

Moran family.description: The Moran family is a Melbourne-based Australian criminal family involved in drug trafficking, corruption, money laundering, and debt collection. Founded by Lewis Moran in the 1970s, the family was heavily involved in the Melbourne gangland killings, a feud that resulted in over 30 deaths from 1998 to 2010. Key members include matriarch Judy Moran, who was convicted of murder in 2011. The family is allied with the Carlton Crew and rivals with the Williams Gang.

descriptions: The Moran family is allied with the Carlton Crew.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Carlton Crew, Federated Ship Painters and Dockers Union

descriptions: The Moran family is rival to the Williams Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Williams Gang

descriptions: The Carlton Crew was allied with the Moran family.
edges.evidence_quote: and were additionally allies of the mostly Irish Moran family

descriptions: Northern Structure is an ally of Nuestra Familia per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Northern Structure

descriptions: A FARDC defector joined Mai-Mai PARECO, which was allied with M23.
edges.evidence_quote: Colonel Albert Kahasha, also called Foka Mike, deputy commander of the 808th FARDC Regiment, who joined the Mai-Mai PARECO group under La Fontaine in Bunyatenge, south of Lubero, in June 2012.

descriptions: Galatolo clan fought Bontade clan over control of wholesale market racket.
edges.evidence_quote: The Acquasanta Mafia clan tried to muscle in on the protection racket that traditionally belonged the 'Mafia of the Gardens' — such as the Greco, Bontade and Sorci clans from the southeast of Palermo

descriptions: Greco and Bontade clans were allies supporting Riccobono.
edges.evidence_quote: Riccobono had been appointed with the strong support of Salvatore Greco and Stefano Bontade

descriptions: Somali Outlaws and East African Posse are allies.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: East African Posse

Ping On.description: Boston-based Chinese criminal organization founded in the 1970s by Stephen 'Sky Dragon' Tse, who had ties to the 14K Triad. It engaged in drug trafficking, arms trafficking, fraud, prostitution, human trafficking, illegal gambling, money laundering, extortion, murder, illegal immigration, and racketeering. The group declined after Tse's imprisonment in the 1980s and was linked to the Boston Chinatown massacre.

descriptions: 14K has connections to Ping On leadership.
edges.evidence_quote: The 14K has had connections to the leadership of the Ping On triad in Boston and Wah Ching in San Francisco.

descriptions: Ping On and 14K Triad are listed as allies in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: 14K , Hung Mong

descriptions: Ping On served as a recruitment and training ground for 14K Triad.
edges.evidence_quote: The Ping On was regarded as a 'farm team' for the 14K triad in Hong Kong.

descriptions: Tse and Ping On were allied with Harry Mook, head of the local Chee Kung Tong.
edges.evidence_quote: Tse was allied with Harry Mook (Goon Chun Yee), head of the local CKT

descriptions: Tse joined Hung Mun before founding Ping On, indicating a predecessor or structural tie.
edges.evidence_quote: Tse joined the On Leong, but they expelled him shortly afterward and he joined the Hung Mun (Chee Kung Tong or CKT) social club in 1977, then founded the Ping On Club in 1982

descriptions: Ping On and Hung Mong were allies in the late 1980s.
edges.evidence_quote: The organization had several allies in the late 1980s, including the Hung Mong which was in operation in New York City.

descriptions: Ping On and Hung Mong are listed as allies in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: 14K , Hung Mong

descriptions: Tse was briefly a member of On Leong before being expelled, indicating a conflict or falling out.
edges.evidence_quote: Tse joined the On Leong, but they expelled him shortly afterward and he joined the Hung Mun

descriptions: Insane South Side Popes are listed as allies of the Gaylords in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: People Nation , Latin Kings , Insane South Side Popes , 12th Street Players, Indiana Aryan Brotherhood, Vice Lords , Latin Brothers

descriptions: Insane South Side Popes were an initial member of the People Nation alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: Among initial members to the People were the Mickey Cobras (then named the Cobra Stones), Bishops, Spanish Lords, soon after the Gaylords and the Insane South Side Popes.
